scene_title: Maos humana e robotica quase se tocando
narrative_beat: Como o fresco de Adao e Deus mas robo substituindo Deus

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid human hand in warm crimson and ochre tones almost touching humanoid robot hand in cold gold and silver like Michelangelo Creation of Adam with light particles transferring between them in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the light particles transferring between the human hand and the robot hand
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated cloudy sky with transmission towers in background
props: human hand in warm crimson ochre
robot hand in cold gold silver

mood.emotion: the border between human and machine erased

symbolism.primary: Creation of Adam inverted — the machine as the new creator
symbolism.secondary: light particles as soul fragment being copied across

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
